posture.label: Barbell
posture.explanation: Base case: AI boom and monetary stress coexist; keep AIM-5 balance.

ai_productivity.interpretation: Evidence is real but monetization and broad productivity flow-through need more proof.

ai_bubble_risk.interpretation: Capex is large; returns, utilization, and financing quality are not yet fully proven.

monetary_reset.interpretation: Local FRED liquidity, credit, fiscal, rates, and spread proxies are available; score is still a simple first-pass model.

energy_bottleneck.interpretation: Starter qualitative score: AI and Bitcoin both expose power and grid constraints.

hard_money_repricing.interpretation: Local BTC and PAXG gold-proxy prices are available; hard-money repricing score is medium-confidence and simple.

aim5_allocation.role: Own profitable AI platforms and infrastructure.
Own physical bottlenecks behind AI and hard money.

signals.name: AI Productivity Starter
signals.note: Placeholder until verified AI revenue, margin, and productivity series are added.

signals.name: AI Capex Bubble Starter
signals.direction: higher means capex return risk is rising
signals.note: Placeholder until hyperscaler capex, financing, and utilization data are added.

signals.name: Energy Bottleneck Starter
signals.direction: higher means power constraints matter more
signals.note: Qualitative starter: AI data centers and Bitcoin mining both expose power constraints.

signals.name: BTC Power Law Fair Value Gap
signals.direction: higher means BTC is repricing above the time-based power-law anchor
signals.note: BTC spot is $66,775 versus a power-law anchor of $133,697, a -50.1% gap.

signals.name: BTC/Gold Ratio
signals.direction: higher means BTC is repricing versus the gold proxy
signals.note: BTC buys roughly 15.0 ounces of the PAXG gold proxy.

signals.name: Gold Proxy Price
signals.direction: higher means the gold shield is repricing in USD terms

signals.name: U.S. M2 Liquidity Context
signals.direction: domestic liquidity context; not the core world-credit thesis signal
signals.note: US M2 is +5.4% YoY at $22,879B; useful context, but world credit is the monetary reset anchor.

signals.name: Fed Balance Sheet YoY
signals.direction: higher adds liquidity; sustained runoff keeps pressure on credit

signals.name: Reverse Repo Buffer
signals.direction: lower means less residual liquidity buffer
signals.note: Overnight reverse repo is $1B, a thin remaining buffer.

signals.name: Treasury General Account
signals.note: TGA is $830B, which keeps liquidity conditions tighter.

signals.name: Net Liquidity Proxy
signals.direction: higher supports risk appetite; lower supports stress
signals.note: Simple WALCL minus RRP minus TGA proxy is $5,873B; roughly 90d change is +2.6%.

signals.name: World Credit Growth
signals.direction: higher means the global stock of paper claims is expanding
signals.note: Total reporting countries credit to the non-financial sector is +6.7% 3Y annualized at 257,926.8; this is the core monetary reset signal, with U.S. M2 demoted to context.

signals.name: U.S. Credit Growth
signals.direction: higher can signal domestic credit expansion and monetary stress
signals.note: U.S. total credit to the non-financial sector is +4.0% YoY at 75,951.1.

signals.name: Federal Debt Growth
signals.direction: higher means fiscal debt load is compounding faster

signals.name: Federal Interest Payments Growth
signals.direction: higher means fiscal interest expense pressure is rising
signals.note: Federal government interest payments is +6.5% YoY at 1,218.9.

signals.name: 10Y Treasury Yield
signals.direction: higher yields tighten discount rates and debt-service conditions

signals.name: 10Y Real Yield
signals.direction: higher real yields increase monetary and credit pressure

signals.name: 10Y Breakeven Inflation
signals.direction: higher breakevens can signal inflation repricing pressure

signals.name: High-Yield Option-Adjusted Spread
signals.direction: higher spreads mean credit stress is rising
signals.note: High-yield option-adjusted spread is 2.72 percentage points.

dashboard_signals.note: Placeholder until verified AI revenue, margin, and productivity series are added.

dashboard_signals.note: BTC buys roughly 15.0 ounces of the PAXG gold proxy.

debate_question: Is AI producing real productivity faster than credit/fiscal stress is degrading money?
